mapper.select: select movie.id as movie_id, name, sum(fare) as boxOffice from movie left join schedule on movie.id = schedule.movie_id left join ticket on schedule.id = ticket.schedule_id where state = 1 group by movie_id
select user_id, sum(fare) as price from ticket left join schedule on ticket.schedule_id = schedule.id where state = 1 group by user_id
select movie_id, name, count(*) as time from schedule left join movie on schedule.movie_id = movie.id where date(start_time) = date(#{date}) group by movie_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket WHERE state = 1 AND DATE(time) = CURDATE()
SELECT IFNULL(AVG(s.fare), 0) FROM ticket t JOIN schedule s ON t.schedule_id = s.id WHERE t.state = 1
SELECT h.name AS name, COUNT(t.id) AS value FROM hall h JOIN schedule s ON h.id = s.hall_id JOIN ticket t ON s.id = t.schedule_id WHERE t.state = 1 GROUP BY h.id, h.name

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.time, '%m-%d') AS date, SUM(s.fare) AS boxOffice FROM ticket t JOIN schedule s ON t.schedule_id = s.id WHERE t.state = 1 AND t.time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(t.time, '%m-%d') ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT m.type AS name, COUNT(t.id) AS value FROM movie m JOIN schedule s ON m.id = s.movie_id JOIN ticket t ON s.id = t.schedule_id WHERE t.state = 1 GROUP BY m.type
